description: Current actionable recommendations. Generated each session based on signals, predictions, and market forecasts. Accuracy is tracked to build confidence over time.

market_regime.label: BEARISH_SIDEWAYS
market_regime.dominant_risk: Iran April 6 deadline — US/Iran military escalation
market_regime.regime_note: Iran outcome April 7 is the single biggest variable. All actions carry elevated uncertainty until clarity.

actions.instruction: Sell 85 shares (50% ICICI lot) at ₹278–285 on any morning strength before 10:30 AM
actions.rationale_short: No catalyst until Q4 results May 8. Iran risk-off + FII selling = downside pressure. Prediction P001 already confirmed breach of ₹260.
actions.confidence_basis: L2: P001 RIGHT (52-wk low breach thesis confirmed). Pattern PAT001 active — FII selling elevated.

signal_details.T001: 52-week low at ₹259 is proven floor — tested and breached Mar 30
signal_details.M003: FII net sold ₹9,931 Cr on Apr 2 — continued outflow pressure

actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: Miss potential 15% Q4 bounce if results strong (May 8)
actions.risk: Q4 FY26 results May 8 — any positive surprise could trigger sharp reversal

drill_down.why_now: SWIGGY at ₹275 — bounced from ₹260 on Apr 2 FY-start relief. Bounce likely fading with no fresh catalyst. Iran risk-off = weak consumer discretionary.
drill_down.what_could_go_wrong: Market gap-up on Iran deal → SWIGGY spikes to ₹290+ before you can sell
drill_down.watch_before_acting: Check Brent at 9:10 AM — if Brent <$100, skip this action. Scenario C (Hormuz reopens) changes picture entirely.

actions.instruction: Watch at open. If Brent >$115 at 9:15 AM OR US strike news overnight → sell 30–50% immediately. If Brent <$100 (deal) → HOLD, strong upside.
actions.rationale_short: IndiGo is the most Iran-sensitive holding. ATF cost = 30–35% of expenses. Brent at $109 = already margin-compressing.
actions.confidence_basis: Pure scenario-dependent. No signal edge until Iran outcome known.

signal_details.M001: Brent crude at $109 — ATF = ~jet fuel * 1.1x. Every $10 Brent rise = ~₹200–300 EPS impact for IndiGo

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: Scenario B (escalation) → INDIGO -5 to -8% from current ₹4,271
actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: Scenario C (deal) → INDIGO +6 to +10%. Missing this upside if sold too early.
actions.risk: Binary — wrong scenario call = significant miss

drill_down.why_now: Iran April 6 deadline created overnight binary. IndiGo at ₹4,271 = 33% above 52-wk low ₹3,216 — has room to fall.
drill_down.what_could_go_wrong: Deal scenario: Hormuz reopens → crude crashes → INDIGO gaps up 8%+ before action.
drill_down.watch_before_acting: FIRST action of the day: check Brent price at 9:00 AM before market opens. This single number determines entire INDIGO strategy.

actions.instruction: Hold all. Prediction P005 tracking RIGHT — ₹451 vs target >₹430. Domestic demand insulates from Iran.
actions.rationale_short: Coal India is the portfolio's best-performing thesis. Insulated from crude. PSU rerating ongoing. No action needed.
actions.confidence_basis: P005 confirming ahead of schedule. ₹451 vs ₹430 target with 52 days remaining.

signal_details.S008: Coal e-auction premiums elevated — power sector demand strong
signal_details.M006: PSU rerating theme — Coal India dividend yield provides price floor

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: Prediction P005 confirms >₹430 → thesis validated through May 28
actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: Broad market selloff could drag even insulated PSU stocks
actions.risk: Scenario B (escalation + market crash) = correlated selloff even for insulated stocks

drill_down.why_now: No action needed — position working. Monitoring only.
drill_down.what_could_go_wrong: Black swan market crash (scenario B extreme) could drag all PSU stocks -10%+
drill_down.watch_before_acting: Next review: April 16 when IREDA earnings may trigger PSU sector re-rating

actions.instruction: Watch — direct Hormuz proxy. Do not add. Consider partial trim if Nifty breaks 22,200.
actions.rationale_short: Port traffic volumes directly impacted by Hormuz blockade. Iran risk = direct negative. Upside only on deal/reopening.
actions.confidence_basis: High uncertainty — binary Iran outcome drives entire thesis.

signal_details.M001: Hormuz blockade reducing oil tanker + cargo flows through key routes
signal_details.M003: FII selling financials and infrastructure names in risk-off

actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: Deal → ADANI PORT +4 to +6% — miss if trimmed early
actions.risk: Adani group headline risk always present

drill_down.why_now: Monitoring pre-Iran-resolution. Decision tree: deal → hold/add, escalation → trim 30%.
drill_down.what_could_go_wrong: Adani group news (unrelated to Iran) = additional downside risk
drill_down.watch_before_acting: Iran resolution first. Then evaluate port traffic recovery trajectory.

actions.instruction: Hold all. Best portfolio hedge while Iran conflict ongoing. Gold at global ATH $5,300/oz.
actions.rationale_short: SETFGOLD is the portfolio's war hedge. Escalation = +2-3%. Only risk is sudden peace deal.
actions.confidence_basis: Gold at ATH with safe-haven bid. Iran war = sustained demand. Clear thesis.

signal_details.M008: Gold at global ATH $5,300/oz — geopolitical premium fully active

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: Escalation scenario → +2–3% on top of current ATH

drill_down.why_now: War hedge is doing its job. No reason to exit while conflict ongoing.
drill_down.what_could_go_wrong: Surprise US-Iran peace deal would compress gold premium quickly
drill_down.watch_before_acting: Exit trigger: Iran officially lifts Hormuz blockade + ceasefire signed.

actions.instruction: Watch — earnings April 16. Do not trade before then. If earnings show FY26 loan book >₹70,000 Cr, consider adding.
actions.rationale_short: Earnings catalyst April 16. Dividend ex-date already passed April 2. Renewable capex theme intact but no near-term trigger.
actions.confidence_basis: Earnings-driven thesis — outcome unknown. Patience required.
actions.risk: Earnings miss on loan book growth = sharp correction

drill_down.why_now: No action until April 16. Just monitoring.
drill_down.what_could_go_wrong: Broader market selloff could drag IREDA before earnings
drill_down.watch_before_acting: April 16 Q4 results — key metric: FY26 loan book size + NIM trend

actions.instruction: Monitor Brent daily. If Brent falls and holds below ₹100 for 3 days, reassess P002 bearish thesis.
actions.rationale_short: Prediction P002 says MRPL falls to ₹160–170 by May 28. Confidence reduced as Brent eased to $105–107. Thesis requires Brent >$110 sustained.
actions.confidence_basis: P002 confidence reduced from 3 to 2 stars on Apr 4 — Brent slightly below $110 threshold.

signal_details.M001: Brent at $109 — slightly below $110 thesis threshold for sustained GRM compression

actions.pnl_impact_if_right: MRPL falls to ₹160–170 (if holding, -10% from entry ₹180)
actions.pnl_impact_if_wrong: Crude collapses → MRPL GRMs recover → stock rallies
actions.risk: Iran deal = crude crash = MRPL rally = P002 fails

drill_down.why_now: Monitoring mode. Thesis slightly weakening but not invalidated.
drill_down.what_could_go_wrong: Crude falls below $90 = MRPL GRM recovery = price upside
drill_down.watch_before_acting: Daily Brent check. Reassess if Brent < $100 for 3 consecutive days.

market_actions.instruction: Check Brent price at 9:00 AM before market open. This single number changes ALL holding strategies for April 7.

scenarios.above_115: Escalation likely → sell INDIGO 30-50%, watch ADANI PORT for trim, SETFGOLD holds strong
scenarios.100_to_115: Status quo → base case, all actions as planned
scenarios.below_100: Deal signal → HOLD INDIGO, HOLD ADANI PORT, consider reducing SETFGOLD

market_actions.instruction: Key support: 22,500. If Nifty opens below 22,500 and holds down → defensive posture across all holdings.

scenarios.above_22800: Scenario C developing → risk-on, hold positions
scenarios.22500_to_22800: Base case scenario A → execute planned actions
scenarios.below_22500: Scenario B developing → reduce exposure aggressively. Next support 22,000–22,200 (P003 target zone)
